name: Hidden Pear Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Can Pears, Liquid Drained and Reserved
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, bring the pear liquid to a boil.
2. Stir in gelatin until dissolved.
3. Remove from heat and cool at room temperature until syrupy.
4. Meanwhile, puree pears in a blender.
5. In a mixing bowl, beat cream cheese and lemon juice until fluffy and smooth.
6. Add the pureed pears and mix well.
7. Prepare whipped topping according to package directions.
8. Fold into pear mixture.
9. Fold in cooled gelatin.
10. Pour into an oiled 4 1/2 cup mold.
11. Chill overnight.
12. Just before serving, unmold salad onto a lettuce-lined platter.
